findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "build_workflow_links" is 8503 chars, far longer than this server's median (387). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Constructs an ordered set of ready-to-use deep-links for a named AINumbers workflow chain or an ad-hoc sequence of tools. Each link points directly to the brows…

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "run_chain" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Executes every step of a named chain (list names with find_chain / build_workflow_links) and returns ONE composite artifact whose execution_hash anchors all ste…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "export_artifact" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Render a verified OpenChainGraph v0.4 artifact into a chaingraph_export profile (OCG Standard §13). Generated downstream of and EXCLUDED from the execution_hash…

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "find_tool" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: BM25 search over all 348 live AINumbers ChainGraph node tools. Returns ranked tools with mcp_name, URL, mandate type, and wave. Use to locate a specific computa…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
